notes: Confirmed on joico.com dedicated line page: permanent creme color with ArgiPlex bond-building technology, 100% gray coverage, including newer Mocha (M) and Natural Beige (NB) series.
Also listed on https://www.joico.com/pro-color/shop/ under LumiShine.

Confirmed on joico.com Pro Color Shop page: collagen-infused permanent creme color, 100% gray coverage; listed as a distinct LumiShine sub-line (Permanent / YouthLock / Lumi10 / Demi-Crème / Demi-Liquid).
Confirmed on joico.com (Pro Color Shop and LumiShine Permanent page): 10-minute permanent color delivering 100% gray coverage.
Confirmed on joico.com Pro Color Shop page: 'LumiShine DD Dimensional Deposit Demi-Permanent Crème Color', ammonia-free deposit system.
Confirmed on joico.com Pro Color Shop page as a distinct demi-permanent liquid format alongside the demi crème.
Confirmed on joico.com dedicated line page: permanent crème color with Quadramine Complex; mixed with Veroxide developers.
Shop page also lists Vero K-PAK sub-ranges: Permanent Crème, Color Age Defy, Chrome (demi, in some listings), Lighteners, Developers.
Confirmed on joico.com Pro Color page: 'system of lighteners & toners created just for blondes' with bond-building Arginine.
Shop page lists sub-lines: Blonde Life Lighteners, Blonde Life Demi Gloss, Blonde Life Quick Tone (liquid-creme toner), Developers — hence categorized mixed_system (lightener + toner).
Confirmed on joico.com Pro Color page: concentrated semi-permanent pigments, applied straight from the tube, 'NO DEVELOPER REQUIRED', lasts up to 20+ shampoos.
Joico markets it as semi-permanent; categorized direct_dye because it is a non-oxidative, no-developer pigment line.

Confirmed on kenraprofessional.com Kenra Color landing page ('PERMANENT: Gentle, low-ammonia color...') and the official 2024 Color Workbook PDF (low ammonia, Balancing Complex 5, up to 100% gray coverage).
Confirmed on kenraprofessional.com landing page and official Color Workbook PDF: ammonia-free, mixed 1:2 with 9 Volume Activator, natural gray coverage up to 75%.
Also confirmed in official blog post '3 Ways to Cover (or Blend) Gray Hair with Kenra Color'.

Confirmed on official Creatives page: intermixable semi-permanent vivid shades (Trendy Chic and Classically Bold palettes), longevity up to 50 washes; Workbook PDF confirms 'KENRA COLOR CREATIVES ... intermixable semi-permanent colors', formulated without developer.

Confirmed on official collection page and product pages (e.g., RoV Rose Violet Rapid Toner): ammonia-free demi-permanent toning cremes processing in 5 minutes or less; 7 intermixable shades (B, SV, VP, GrBl, SA, GV, RoV).
Confirmed on kenraprofessional.com landing page ('Get Permanent Color in 10 minutes') and Workbook PDF: 17 permanent shades processing in 10 minutes or less with Kenra Color Developer 10V-30V.
Confirmed on kenraprofessional.com Kenra Color landing page: 'a collection of high-performance lighteners, toners, and ultra lifts'; also appears in the official Color Workbook PDF.
Collection spans lighteners plus toners/ultra lifts; primary positioning is blonding, so categorized lightener.
Confirmed on pravana.com color category page: 'Award-winning permanent creme hair colors, formulated with silk and keratin span over 12 different tonal families.'
Official 2022 Product Knowledge Guide PDF corroborates the ChromaSilk permanent portfolio.

Confirmed on official VIVIDS Original line and shade pages: 'semi-permanent, non-oxidative hair color that is designed to be used without developer'; sub-collections VIVIDS Original, VIVIDS Neons (and Pastels per official PDF) listed on pravana.com.
Marketed as semi-permanent; categorized direct_dye because it is non-oxidative and developer-free.

Listed on pravana.com color category page; official Product Knowledge Guide PDF states 'VIVIDS Everlasting permanent hair color bridges the gap between permanent creme hair color and direct dye' and that it intermixes with ChromaSilk Permanent Crème.

Confirmed on official product pages (filed under demi-permanent on pravana.com): ammonia-free toners processing in 5 minutes or less, mixed 1:1.5 with ChromaSilk Zero Lift Creme Developer; Blondes and Brunette series confirmed in official PDF.

Confirmed on pravana.com color category page ('Pure Light Lighteners offer innovative lightening options') and official PDF: Pure Light Power Lightener (up to 7 levels of lift, blue dust-free powder) and Pure Light Ultra Lightener (up to 9 levels, ReUnite Mending Technology).
VIVIDS shade pages instruct pre-lightening with the 'PRAVANA PURE LIGHT series'.
Confirmed on official Paul Mitchell international site (paulmitchell.co.th): permanent cream color, low ammonia, beeswax base, ChromaLuxe technology.
Behindthechair.com listing (updated Oct 2024) corroborates current availability and points to pro.paulmitchell.com; US pro site itself could not be fetched directly, so region marked global.

Confirmed on official Paul Mitchell international site: permanent cream color with DYESMART System, up to 100% gray coverage; separate official page confirms Color XG CoverSmart for 50%+ gray / resistant hair.

Verified via Salon Success (official Paul Mitchell UK distributor, salon-success.co.uk): ammonia-free demi-permanent cream color shade-matched to Color XG, 1:1 with 10 volume Cream Developer; launch and positioning corroborated by Estetica Magazine trade press.
No official paulmitchell.com/paulmitchellpro.com line page was directly fetched, hence official_line_url null.
Confirmed on official Paul Mitchell international site: demi-permanent no-ammonia formula, 65+ shades including Flash Toners, Muted Metallics and Clear, 5-20 minute processing.
Officially positioned as the replacement for the retired PM Shines line.
Official Paul Mitchell US Facebook video 'PM SHINES x The Demi: Making the Switch' states PM Shines 'will be retiring this year' and that The Demi is its replacement.
Demi-permanent liquid shine color; no longer listed on current Paul Mitchell sites.

Semi-permanent/direct-dye cream vivids line, 13 intermixable shades, no developer; verified via official Paul Mitchell Germany page (still listed as salon-exclusive) and official Pop XG education PDF.
Status unclear: search results suggest the line may have been discontinued in US professional distribution, but the official German site still lists it; could not confirm on a US official page.

brand_line_inventory.product_line_name: Paul Mitchell The Color (10 Minute express permanent)
notes: A 10-minute express permanent line ('Color 10 Minute') is described with its own swatch chart by third-party sources (beautywithfam.com chart guide) for quick gray coverage at levels 3-7.
Could not verify on an official Paul Mitchell page during this research, so status is unclear.

brand_line_inventory.product_line_name: Paul Mitchell Lighteners (e.g., Dual-Purpose Lightener, Skylight, Bond Rx)
notes: Paul Mitchell clearly sells professional lighteners (official Pop XG education PDF instructs to 'pre-lighten hair with your favorite Paul Mitchell lightener'), and search results name Dual-Purpose Lightener, Skylight clay lightener, and Bond Rx Lightener.
Individual lightener names were not confirmed on a fetched official page, so the specific product roster is marked unclear rather than asserted.

Confirmed on pulpriothair.com: 'The NEW Pulp Riot Paint', 40+ intermixable vibrant shades, no developer, lasts up to 50 washes; sub-collections include OG Semis, Elemental, Cosmic (official pages fetched).
Marketed as semi-permanent; categorized direct_dye because it is applied without developer.

Confirmed on official FACTION8 page: full permanent color line with bold deposit, cool-based naturals (-00, -0, -03), up to 100% grey coverage, 1:1 with Pulp Riot Developer; includes High Lift series mixed 1:2.

Confirmed on official category and shade pages (e.g., Icy): alkaline express toners for pre-lightened hair, tone in as little as 5 minutes, mixed 1:2 with 6 or 10 volume developer, adjustable ratios up to 1:4.

The line verifiably existed: no-lift, ammonia-free acidic demi-permanent liquid color, 1:1 with dedicated Liquid Demi 6.7 vol Developer, ~35 cool-based shades (confirmed via multiple professional retailers including SalonCentric-affiliated listings and salon education sources).

Status unclear: no Liquid Demi page exists on pulpriothair.com today (fetch of /products/haircolor/liquid-demi returned 404, and the site's color navigation shows only semi-permanent, FACTION8 permanent, and High Speed Toners); a salon blog explicitly states the Liquid Demis 'have since been discontinued', while some Canadian retailers still show stock.
Confirmed on official lighteners page: 'Pulp Riot offers a range of high performance lighteners designed for any blonding situation, technique, or application.'
Page is JS-heavy, so individual lightener product names could not be read from the fetched HTML.

Confirmed on official page: persulfate-based, dripless white formula mixed 1:3 with Pulp Riot developer to remove semi-permanent/direct-dye pigment; official copy notes it 'will lighten natural hair'.
Strictly a color remover rather than a dye line; it sits under the Lighteners section of pulpriothair.com, hence line_category lightener (no 'remover' category exists in the taxonomy).

issue_log.details: Line is documented by professional retailers and a dedicated developer (Liquid Demi 6.7 vol), but pulpriothair.com no longer lists it (direct fetch returned 404) and a salon source states it was discontinued. Marked unclear; could not find an official discontinuation notice.
Per hair2buy.co.uk, L'Oréal discontinued Pulp Riot distribution in the UK and Ireland as of September 30, 2024. US distribution (SalonCentric) continues. Inventory entries reflect US market.

Fetched pages (/products/haircolor, /products/lighteners, collection pages) render only header/intro text without product grids, so individual SKU/collection names within Lighteners could not be enumerated from HTML.

https://www.paulmitchellpro.com/professional-hair-color returned 404. Verification relied on official international Paul Mitchell sites (paulmitchell.co.th, paulmitchell.de), official education PDFs, official distributor Salon Success (UK), and trade press; affected lines are marked region 'global' instead of 'US'.

Referenced by third-party chart guides and search synthesis as a current 10-minute permanent line, but no official Paul Mitchell page confirming it was fetched. Included with apparent_status 'unclear'.

issue_log.item: Paul Mitchell lighteners (Dual-Purpose Lightener, Skylight, Bond Rx)
issue_log.details: Specific lightener product names appeared only in search-result synthesis, not on a fetched official page. The existence of Paul Mitchell lighteners as a category is supported by official Pop XG education materials, so a single lightener entry was logged as 'unclear' rather than enumerating unverified names.
Official paulmitchell.de still lists Pop XG as a salon-exclusive line, but search results indicate it may no longer be distributed in the US (e.g., not found at SalonCentric). Marked unclear.
Official Paul Mitchell US Facebook video confirms PM Shines was retired and replaced by The Demi. Included with apparent_status 'discontinued'.

pravana.com product pages display a 'Color Certification Program' modal for pro features; core line descriptions were still readable. Some structural details (e.g., full VIVIDS sub-collection roster) were cross-checked against the official Product Knowledge Guide PDF dated 2022, which may not reflect 2026 line changes.
Simply Blonde spans lighteners, toners, and ultra lifts per the official landing page; categorized as 'lightener' (primary positioning) rather than splitting into unverified sub-lines.

The joico.com Pro Color Shop page navigation shows a 'Chrome' item under Vero K-PAK in one menu variant, but no dedicated description was captured in fetched content, so it was noted within the Vero K-PAK entry rather than listed as a separate verified line.

Parent companies (Henkel for Joico/Kenra/Pravana, L'Oréal for Pulp Riot, John Paul Mitchell Systems for Paul Mitchell) are based on widely reported acquisitions and were not re-verified on official corporate pages during this session.
